description: 32 essential CLI tools — one pip install. Zero-dependency Python tools for developers.

tools.name: b64
tools.desc: Base64 encode/decode with auto-detection

tools.name: cal
tools.desc: Terminal calendar & date calculator

tools.name: chart-cli
tools.desc: Terminal chart generator — bar, line, pie histograms

tools.name: colors
tools.desc: 256-color table, HEX↔RGB conversion, color picker

tools.name: csv-stats
tools.desc: Column analysis, histograms, frequency tables, correlation matrix

tools.name: dirsize
tools.desc: Recursive directory size analyzer with sorting

tools.name: dt
tools.desc: Date/time format conversions, timestamps, timezone offsets

tools.name: envcheck
tools.desc: Environment variable validator — missing keys, formats, types

tools.name: ff
tools.desc: Fuzzy finder — curses TUI, search files/history/anything

tools.name: find-dups
tools.desc: Find duplicate files by hash, size, or name

tools.name: hashsum
tools.desc: File hash verification — MD5, SHA-1/256/512, BLAKE2, auto-detect

tools.name: http-live
tools.desc: SSE hot-reload HTTP server — live reload for development

tools.name: ipinfo
tools.desc: Public IP & geolocation lookup (ip-api.com)

tools.name: jq-lite
tools.desc: jq-style JSON query — filter, extract, transform

tools.name: json2csv
tools.desc: JSON to CSV converter with nested key flattening

tools.name: jsonql
tools.desc: SQL-like JSON query: SELECT, WHERE, GROUP BY, ORDER

tools.name: license-cli
tools.desc: License key generator/validator with configurable rules

tools.name: markdown-check
tools.desc: Markdown linter — broken links, style issues, structure

tools.name: nb
tools.desc: Command-line notebook — JSON-backed, full-text search

tools.name: passgen
tools.desc: Password generator — customizable length, charset, rules

tools.name: portcheck
tools.desc: Port scanner — TCP connect scan, range, service detection

tools.name: project-doctor
tools.desc: Project health check — meta files, structure, code quality

tools.name: ren
tools.desc: Batch file renamer — prefix/suffix/replace/regex/number

tools.name: siege-lite
tools.desc: HTTP load tester — concurrency, latency, throughput stats

tools.name: smellfinder
tools.desc: Python code smell detector — AST analysis, 10+ patterns

tools.name: sqlite-cli
tools.desc: SQLite database query tool — CSV/JSON/table output

tools.name: sysmon
tools.desc: Real-time system monitor — CPU/mem/disk/net/processes

tools.name: timer
tools.desc: Countdown timer & stopwatch with desktop notifications

tools.name: treedir
tools.desc: Tree-style directory listing with depth control

tools.name: urlparse
tools.desc: URL parser & builder — extract/manipulate URL components

tools.name: web-summary
tools.desc: Web page extractor — title, body text, links, keywords

tools.name: wordcount
tools.desc: Word/char/line counter with language detection
